## Overview
Modernize the marketing website with new design system and improved UX.

## Goals
- Improve mobile experience
- Increase conversion rate by 25%
- Reduce page load time by 40%

## Timeline
- Phase 1 (Design): Jan - Feb 2026
- Phase 2 (Development): Mar - Apr 2026
- Phase 3 (Testing): May 2026
- Launch: June 2026
